data.name: 都市女孩:心跳海风
data.detailed_description:
Official QQ Discussion Group:
864879210 (How to unlock the content you want~)

A silver-haired girl, encounters a bikini-cutie
A jet ski girl who will teach you how to ride the waves~
A BBQ shop owner – make money together and listen to her stories late at night~

​About Us:​​
Hi, we are R.Y.Love♂!
Our goal is to create an urban life simulation game with high freedom of exploration.
Here, you can freely explore different locations, romance various types of girls, and trigger all kinds of events.

​Game Introduction:​​
In this game, you play as a 25-year-old man working hard while building relationships with girls from all walks of life.
By increasing a girl’s affection, players can unlock more content and experience deeper storylines.

​Character Introductions:​​

  • Silver-haired girl

  • Jet ski girl

  • BBQ shop owner

  • Housewife

  • Office receptionist

  • Cherry blossom girl

  • Mall shopping girl

  • Convenience store cutie

​Game Features:​​

  • Freely explore beach and city maps – each building has its own function, including your own apartment, office building, mall, and more.

  • Romance 3 beach girls and 5 city girls – interact with them and share happy moments together.

  • Each girl has her own mini-games, immersing you in emotional development.

​More Info:​​
This game is presented in a top-down 3D perspective. Future updates will include new urban girls, interactive storylines, and plenty of spicy content – stay tuned!

Feel free to share your expectations for the game in this group – we’ll do our best to incorporate your ideas!

Unlike other similar games, ours offers more than just adult content – we promise a fresh and engaging experience!

data.short_description: An ACG love adventure game with free exploration. Featuring 3 beach girls and 5 city girls. Rich storyline, emotional bonding, and plenty of activities (exactly the kind you're hoping for~).

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 10.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
